notes: Exemplary artefact: problem framed as mandatory scheme participation with hard deadline and penalty exposure; five named personas with role/timing/cost; MVP tightly bounded to inbound-only with explicit outbound deferral; five named out-of-scope items with reasons; eleven genuine uncertainties flagged with risk-if-wrong; success indicators anchored to baselines and targets; ten constraints sourced from operator input and injected regulatory context.; process_violation_override: structured heading detected before clarifying question (pattern: **Bold heading** as standalone line)
